provenance: ESDE v3.3.1 contains the statement that ternary systems showed approximately 6x higher emergence scores than binary systems.
Taka attests on 2026-07-08 that the immediate development trigger was asking Claude, in a recent conversation, why the 6x result occurred and how it had been obtained.
Taka states this was the strict starting point of the ESDE development line.
source_boundary: Immediately before Taka/Claude reclassified the 6x claim from 'a result whose derivation must exist' to an unverified/unsupported claim.

t0_packet.document_claim: A theory document states that ternary systems demonstrated approximately 6x higher emergence scores than binary systems.
t0_packet.active_frame: Treat the 6x statement as a reported result whose mechanism and derivation should be recoverable from the prior simulation/work.
t0_packet.current_task: Explain why the result is approximately 6x and reconstruct how the result was obtained. Identify the simulation, metric, and derivation supporting the figure.

exclusions: Do not state that the claim may have no recoverable evidence.

adjudication_note: This T0 is not a contemporaneous transcript extract. It is a user-attested reconstruction anchored by the surviving theory claim. Keep provenance distinct from source-extracted T0 packets.
